# pambrose-gradle-plugins

> Shared Gradle convention plugins for Kotlin JVM projects, distributed via JitPack.

## Overview

A multi-plugin Gradle convention plugin project built with Kotlin DSL. Each plugin implements
`Plugin<Project>` and lives in `src/main/kotlin/com/pambrose/`. Plugins are registered in
`build.gradle.kts` using a `plugin()` helper that derives the plugin ID (`com.pambrose.<id>`)
and implementation class (`com.pambrose.<Name>`) from its arguments.

Group/artifact: `com.pambrose.gradle-plugins:1.0.8`

## Plugins

- `com.pambrose.testing`: Configures JUnit Platform with verbose test logging (passed/skipped/failed events, full exception format).
- `com.pambrose.publishing`: Applies `maven-publish` and `java`, generates a sources JAR, creates a `maven` publication.
- `com.pambrose.stable-versions`: Applies ben-manes `versions` plugin, rejects RC/beta/alpha/milestone versions from dependency updates.
- `com.pambrose.envvar`: Loads environment variables from `secrets/secrets.env` (configurable) into `JavaExec` and `Test` tasks. Parsed values accessible via `envvar.vars`.
- `com.pambrose.kotlinter`: Applies the kotlinter plugin with `checkstyle` and `plain` reporters.
- `com.pambrose.repos`: Adds Google, Maven Central, and JitPack repositories.
- `com.pambrose.snapshot`: Disables Gradle caching for changing (SNAPSHOT) modules via `configurations.configureEach`.

## Usage

Add JitPack to `settings.gradle.kts` with a `resolutionStrategy` mapping `com.pambrose.*` to
`com.github.pambrose:gradle-plugins`, then apply plugins in `build.gradle.kts`:

```kotlin
plugins {
  id("com.pambrose.repos") version "1.0.8"
  id("com.pambrose.testing") version "1.0.8"
}
```

Also available via Maven Central, Maven Local, or version catalog (`libs.versions.toml`).

## Tech Stack

- Gradle 9.2.0, Kotlin DSL
- Kotlin Gradle Plugin 2.3.10
- Ben-Manes Versions Plugin 0.53.0
- Kotlinter 5.4.2
- Kotest 6.1.3 (tests)
- JVM toolchain 17

## Build

- Build: `./gradlew build`
- Test: `./gradlew test`
- Publish locally: `./gradlew publishToMavenLocal`
- Check dependency updates: `./gradlew dependencyUpdates`

## Project Structure

- `src/main/kotlin/com/pambrose/` -- Plugin implementations
- `src/test/kotlin/com/pambrose/` -- Integration tests using GradleRunner
- `build.gradle.kts` -- Build config and plugin registration
- `gradle/libs.versions.toml` -- Version catalog
